---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the contract or frontend
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or transaction hashes where relevant.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- Rust version: [e.g. 1.77.0]
- Browser (for frontend bugs): [e.g. Chrome 124]
- Network: [testnet / local]

## Contract Transaction (if applicable)

If this is a contract bug, paste the transaction hash or the Stellar CLI invocation you ran.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
